name: Sweetwater Activity Center
description: Sweetwater Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Thomson, GA. There are 3 asphalt and wood courts. 1 is indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Thomson High School
description: Thomson High School is a place to play pickleball in Thomson, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
